title: AIIMS Madurai Project Technical Support II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Madurai (AIIMS Madurai)
short_info: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Madurai (AIIMS Madurai) Project Technical Support II Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of AIIMS Madurai. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Madurai Project Technical Support II Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit for Project Technical Support II is 30 years. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: 12th in Science + Diploma (MLT/DMLT) + 5 Years Experience OR Graduate degree
qualification.details: Project Technical Support II: 12th in Science + Diploma (MLT/DMLT) + Five Years Experience in relevant subject/field. Three Years Graduate degree in Science – B.Sc. (public health, medical social work, nursing, MLT, sociology, psychology, pharmacology, nutrition and dietetics, biochemistry, microbiology, allied health sciences, chemistry, physics, statistics) + two years' experience in relevant subject or postgraduation in the above fields. | Experience: 5 years (for Diploma holders) or 2 years (for Graduate/Postgraduate holders) in relevant subject/field. Previous experience in similar field/community-based projects/health system related research projects is desirable. Ability to speak, read and write in Tamil is desirable.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs 20000 per month with HRA (18%) = Rs 24000 p.m.
salary_details.details: Rs 20000 per month with HRA (18%) = Rs 24000 p.m.

selection_process: Preliminary assessment (written exam and hands on exercise) Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Madurai Project Technical Support II Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Madurai to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Madurai Project Technical Support II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Project Technical Support II post at AIIMS Madurai is 19th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Technical Support II position?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have passed 12th in Science with a Diploma in MLT/DMLT and 5 years of experience, or a Graduate degree in Science with 2 years of experience, or a Postgraduate degree in relevant fields.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Technical Support II post is 30 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support II role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive Rs 20000 per month with HRA (18%), totaling Rs 24000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the AIIMS Madurai Project Technical Support II job?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the provided Google form link before the deadline.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for any category of candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Technical Support II post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a preliminary assessment, which includes a written exam and a hands-on exercise, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Project Technical Support II at AIIMS Madurai.

faq.question: Q9. What is the nature of this job?
faq.answer: This is a project-based job, funded by ICMR.

faq.question: Q10. Who should I contact if I have queries regarding the application?
faq.answer: For any queries, you can write to [email protected].
